§6Yharonite§f

§aA DFC-derived exotic material essential for Fau armor — produced from polonium-210!§f

§bYharonite§f is a rare exotic material produced by exposing §bPolonium-210§f to the intense heat of a §bTungsten Crate§f attached to a §bDFC§f. It is an essential component for advanced endgame armor.

§6Production§f:
§b• Requires a §bDFC§f with a §bTungsten Crate§f attached
§b• The tungsten crate uses the DFC beam heat to instantly smelt items and transmute polonium-210 into yharonite
§b• Output: §bYharonite Billets§f and §bYharonite Inserts§f

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bFau Armor Platings§f — requires yharonite billets
§b• §bBroken Pocket Watch§f — used to craft euphemium armor chestplate, requires yharonite billets
§b• §bYharonite Insert§f — used in advanced reactor components

§eTip§f: Yharonite production is gated behind the DFC. You will need a functional DFC before you can craft Fau armor or euphemium armor chestplate. The tungsten crate is an alternative to the DFC receiver — instead of generating electricity, it uses the beam heat for industrial processing.
